steps.t: Théodmar can be found by the Riders' tents, outside the Mead Hall of Cliving. Walnoth has asked you to speak with Théodmar about the Rohirrim dagger f…
Walnoth waits at the central fountain of Cliving, west of the Mead Hall. Walnoth is eager to hear what Théodmar had to say regarding the murder-weapon…
